creator: freebsd-bugzilla@spam.scroner.com
text:
Created attachment 162517
Build log for musicpd

10.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE #0 r286666: Wed Aug 12 15:26:37 UTC 2015     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

My poudriere build of audio/musicpd has been failing during configure, looking for libicu. Attached the build log, and a patch that adds a devel/icu dependency, which works for me under 10.2.
